name: Arleigh Burke-class Destroyer
description: Workhorse of the US Navy surface fleet, the Aegis-equipped guided missile destroyer excels at air defense, anti-submarine warfare, and land-attack missions. Over 70 hulls in service.

specialAbilities.name: Aegis Combat System
specialAbilities.description: SPY-1D radar and Aegis fire control provide simultaneous tracking and engagement of over 100 aerial targets.

specialAbilities.name: Ballistic Missile Defense
specialAbilities.description: SM-3 interceptors provide theater ballistic missile defense capability, protecting allied territories.
